title: xerochrysum alpinum
intro: Xerochrysum alpinum, also known as Tasmanian everlasting, is a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its small, yellow daisy-like flowers that remain upright and intact after falling from the stem. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Xerochrysum alpinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Xerochrysum alpinum, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be made from the plant's leaves and flowers, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
